pi_items.metadata_value: Professional conference post-event evaluation (PCMA/MPI best practices)
pi_items.verified_value: PCMA and MPI are real organizations promoting conference evaluation best practices
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed: PCMA (Professional Convention Management Association) at https://www.pcma.org/ provides training on post-event evaluation. MPI (Meeting Professionals International) at https://www.mpi.org/ offers professional development in meeting management including post-event assessment. LimeSurvey offers official Conference Satisfaction Survey Template (https://www.limesurvey.org/template/conference-satisfaction-survey-template) for evaluating attendee experience.

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims verified. The task creates a synthetic LimeSurvey survey titled 'Annual Tech Summit 2024 — Attendee Feedback' with precisely configured questions: ATTENDED_SESSIONS (Yes/No gate for session attendance), OVERALL_RATING (1-10 numeric satisfaction), IMPROVE_COMMENTS (text feedback), arranged in three groups (Overall Conference Experience, Session Feedback, Future Event Planning). The task is designed for Meeting, Convention, and Event Planners (SOC 13-1121), a real occupation with standard federal job classification. The conditional logic pattern (showing session feedback only to attendees, improvement suggestions only to dissatisfied respondents) reflects PCMA/MPI industry best practices for event feedback collection. The end-redirect URL target is techsummit.example.com. LimeSurvey Expression Manager's grelevance (group-level) and relevance (question-level) fields support the required conditional branching.
